late_news.headline: Hwang's magic sparks South Korea comeback win
late_news.detail: Hwang In-Beom leads South Korea to a 2-1 comeback win over Czechia in the World Cup in a game played in front of hundreds of empty seats at Mexico's Guadalajara Stadium.

late_news.headline: South Korea produce stirring revival to get off to...
late_news.detail: For the first time since 2010, South Korea won their opening game at the FIFA World Cup.

late_news.headline: Snubbed by the U.S., Jesse Marsch marches Canada i...
late_news.detail: Jesse Marsch was certain he was going to be the next USMNT manager. He wasn't. Now he's determined to make his mark at this World Cup with Canada.
